title: Himantoglossum parviflorum

Within the Orchidoideae subfamily, Himantoglossum parviflorum is further classified as part of the tribe Orchideae. The genus Himantoglossum is a small group of orchids that are native to Europe and North Africa. Himantoglossum parviflorum is a rare species within this genus.
